name: Conspirateurs
author: Traditional (France, pre-1800) / nestorgames 2018 edition / AGP port
description: A traditional French race game (pre-1800, here following the nestorgames 2-player edition). On a 17x17 board, each player drops 21 'conspirateurs' onto the central 9x5 'secret meeting place', then -- Halma-style, with NO capturing -- steps and multi-jumps them out to the perimeter SANCTUARIES. The first to get all of their men into shelters wins. A man already in a sanctuary may not move.
